channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Scientists Identify Another Contributor to Global Warming—and It’s Everywhere - Gizmodo
item.description:
1. Scientists Identify Another Contributor to Global Warming—and It’s Everywhere  Gizmodo
  2. Atmospheric warming contributions from airborne microplastics and nanoplastics  Nature
  3. The Great Pacific Garbage Patch is a plastic trash nightmare. It could also be part of a much bigger, hidden problem  CNN
  4. How microplastics are likely helping to heat up the planet  The Washington Post
  5. Heat-Trapping Microplastics Found to Play Role in Climate Change  Bloomberg.com

item.title: A bright moon may dim the Eta Aquarid meteor shower made up of Halley's comet debris - KSL News
item.description:
1. A bright moon may dim the Eta Aquarid meteor shower made up of Halley's comet debris  KSL News

  4. 'Beautiful streaks': Eta Aquariids meteor shower to light up skies over Britain  Sky News
  5. Meteor shower to reach peak visibility over Milwaukee this week  Milwaukee Journal Sentinel

item.title: NASA Releases Thousands of Unseen Artemis II Photos - PetaPixel
item.description:

  5. NASA quietly shares 12,000 new Artemis II photos. See the best here.  Live Science

item.title: Astronomers believe they’ve detected an atmosphere around a tiny, icy world beyond Pluto - NBC News
item.description:
1. Astronomers believe they’ve detected an atmosphere around a tiny, icy world beyond Pluto  NBC News

  3. Atmosphere detected on celestial body in solar system's far reaches  Reuters
  4. Scientists Found An 'Impossible' Atmosphere on A Tiny World Beyond Neptune  ScienceAlert
  5. A small object past Pluto may have a thin atmosphere  Science News

item.title: Scientists discover 27 potential new planets that orbit two stars in solar systems far, far away - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Scientists discover 27 potential new planets that orbit two stars in solar systems far, far away  The Guardian
  2. Astronomers Discover 27 Potential Planets Each Orbiting Two Stars, Just Like the Fictional Tatooine in 'Star Wars'  Smithsonian Magazine

  4. For NASA’s TESS, Stellar Eclipses Shed Light on Possible New Worlds  NASA Science (.gov)
  5. Astronomers Spot Dozens of Potential ‘Tatooine’ Worlds  Sci.News

item.description:

  4. Scientists Just Uncovered a Dark Airless Super Earth that Looks Like a Giant Mercury Only 48 Light Years Away  The Daily Galaxy

item.title: How a newly discovered organelle could help reduce cow methane emissions - Phys.org
item.description:
